Version
  • API Reference
  • Serialization
  • Serialization

Serialization

General-purpose serialization utilities for converting agent framework objects to and from dictionaries and JSON strings. Use register_type! to extend the serializer with custom types.

Dict Conversion

AgentFramework.serialize_to_dict — Function
serialize_to_dict(obj) -> Dict{String, Any}

Serialize an object to a JSON-compatible dictionary. Includes a _type field for round-trip deserialization.

AgentFramework.deserialize_from_dict — Function
deserialize_from_dict(dict::Dict{String, Any}) -> Any

Deserialize an object from a dictionary using the _type field to look up the appropriate constructor from the type registry. Returns the raw dict if the type is unknown.

JSON Conversion

AgentFramework.serialize_to_json — Function
serialize_to_json(obj) -> String

Serialize an object to a JSON string via serialize_to_dict.

AgentFramework.deserialize_from_json — Function
deserialize_from_json(json::String) -> Any

Deserialize an object from a JSON string using the type registry.

Message Serialization

AgentFramework.serialize_messages — Function
serialize_messages(messages::Vector{Message}) -> String

Serialize a vector of messages to a JSON string.

AgentFramework.deserialize_messages — Function
deserialize_messages(json::String) -> Vector{Message}

Deserialize a vector of messages from a JSON string.

Type Registration

AgentFramework.register_type! — Function
register_type!(type_name::String, constructor::Function)

Register a type for deserialization. The constructor should accept a Dict{String, Any} and return the deserialized object.

register_type!(::Type{T}) where T

Register a Julia type using its name. Uses generic keyword-constructor deserialization.

AgentFramework.register_state_type! — Function
register_state_type!(::Type{T}) where T

Register a structured type for recursive session/workflow state serialization. This is an alias for register_type!.
